markets.question: XRP Up or Down - March 12, 3:55PM-4:00PM ET
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the XRP price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the XRP/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/xrp-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream XRP/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

markets.question: Raptors vs. Pelicans: 1H O/U 114.5
markets.description:
In the first half of the NBA game between Raptors and Pelicans, scheduled for March 11 at 8:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if the Raptors and Pelicans combine to score 115 or more points in the first half.

If the combined first half total is less than 115, this market will resolve to "Under".

The result will be determined based on the score at halftime only.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

events.title: Raptors vs. Pelicans
events.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for March 11 at 8:00PM ET:
If the Raptors win, the market will resolve to "Raptors".
If the Pelicans win, the market will resolve to "Pelicans".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

markets.question: Naz Reid: Assists O/U 1.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for March 11 at 10:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if Naz Reid records more than 1.5 assists during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if Naz Reid records 1.5 assists or fewer during the game.

The entire game including all overtime periods will be considered.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

If the player is listed as inactive or otherwise does not take the court at any point, the market will resolve "No".

The resolution source will be the official NBA box score as published on NBA.com.

events.title: Timberwolves vs. Clippers
events.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for March 11 at 10:30PM ET:
If the Timberwolves win, the market will resolve to "Timberwolves".
If the Clippers win, the market will resolve to "Clippers".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

markets.question: Spread: Thunder (-5.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for March 12 at 9:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Thunder" if the Thunder win the game by 6 or more points.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Celtics". If the game ends in a tie, this market will resolve to "Celtics".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

events.title: Celtics vs. Thunder
events.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for March 12 at 9:30PM ET:
